previousFix.description: Expanded the Help & FAQ to comprehensively cover every feature. It now has 15 categories and 46 articles: Getting Around, Nutrition & Diet, Tracking, Workouts, Progress & Insights, Social & Partners, Achievements, Personal Coach (AI), Plan Management, Wellness, Notifications, Subscription, Account, Data & Privacy, and Troubleshooting — covering onboarding, dashboard, meal logging/swaps/macros, weight & measurements, workouts/progressive-overload/PRs, Health Score, weekly review, body composition, friends/leaderboards/partner groups, XP/levels/badges, goal change/pause/weekly updates, wellness check-ins, notifications, Health Connect sync, offline, and more. Screenshot shows the expanded list live on the FAQ screen. Note: the backend also has two leftover 'test'/'test2' help categories — those are backend data you can remove from the admin content panel whenever; the app content itself is now comprehensive.

SEO articles live on nyus.in: 15 exercise form guides (barbell bench press, deadlift, squat, pull-up, row, curls, lunges, plank + 11 more), 3 fitness articles (protein, progressive overload, body composition), 5 high-protein meal recipes. Exercise images served via HTTPS /uploads/ proxy on nginx. Sitemap updated. All pages indexed with schema.org Article/Recipe markup + GA4.

previousFix.description: Yes — visitor analytics is now set up site-wide + verified collecting. Finding: only the landing + 10 fitness guides had GA4; the 873 exercise + 795 meal articles (the bulk of SEO traffic) were UNtracked. Fixed: injected GA4 (G-D020NJ3FCC, same property as the landing) into the shared blog template head, so all 1,669 blog pages now report. Verified LIVE transmitting — a headless load of a real article fired google-analytics.com/g/collect?tid=G-D020NJ3FCC (a true pageview, not just a tag). Improvement: each article's Download CTA now sends an app_download_click GA4 event (source:blog) so you can measure blog -> Play Store conversion per page. NYUSLANDING@bf69308, deployed to nyus.in. OWNER ACTION (for the 'check analytics every 30 min' monitoring loop): reading live visitor NUMBERS needs GA4 read access — either add me to the GA4 property or drop a service-account JSON with Analytics Data API access; until then I can tag/instrument but can't pull the realtime figures to auto-suggest content improvements.
